/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/hm30_rtp_receiver.dir/hm30_rtp_receiver_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hm30_rtp_receiver.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hm30_rtp_receiver.dir/dashboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hm30_rtp_receiver.dir/video_widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hm30_rtp_receiver.dir/stream_decoder.cpp.o -o hm30_rtp_receiver  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.3 -lavformat -lavcodec -lavutil -lswscale -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.3
